name: xcom-enhanced-gallery
description: Media viewer and download functionality for X.com

scripts.preinstall: test -f packages/core/package.json || { echo '⚠️  Submodule not initialized. Run: git submodule update --init'; exit 1; }
scripts.build:extension: pnpm -s prebuild:extension && vite build --config vite.extension.config.ts && vite build --config vite.extension.cs.config.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-extension-build.ts dist-extension
scripts.build:extension:firefox: pnpm -s prebuild:extension:firefox && vite build --config vite.extension.firefox.config.ts && vite build --config vite.extension.firefox.cs.config.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-extension-build.ts dist-extension-firefox
scripts.build:all: pnpm build && pnpm build:extension && pnpm build:extension:firefox
scripts.build:extension:ci: vite build --config vite.extension.config.ts && vite build --config vite.extension.cs.config.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-extension-build.ts dist-extension
scripts.build:extension:firefox:ci: vite build --config vite.extension.firefox.config.ts && vite build --config vite.extension.firefox.cs.config.ts && npx tsx scripts/verify-extension-build.ts dist-extension-firefox
scripts.build:all:ci: pnpm -s check-versions && pnpm -s build:ci && pnpm -s build:extension:ci && pnpm -s build:extension:firefox:ci
scripts.circular: pnpm dlx madge --circular --ts-config tsconfig.json --extensions ts,tsx src
scripts.quality: pnpm -s fmt && pnpm -s lint && pnpm -s check && pnpm -s check:i18n && pnpm -s circular && pnpm -s knip && pnpm -s quality:nose
scripts.quality:ci: pnpm -s fmt && pnpm -s lint && pnpm -s check && pnpm -s circular && pnpm -s knip && pnpm -s quality:nose
scripts.quality:fix: pnpm -s fmt:fix && pnpm -s lint:fix && pnpm -s check && pnpm -s circular && pnpm -s knip
scripts.quality:nose: bash -c 'if command -v nose &>/dev/null; then nose query src --baseline .nose-baseline.json --fail-on new; else echo "[nose] not installed — skipping"; fi'

author: PiesP
